channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Foreign Officials Do Not Have First Amendment Immunity From U.S. Sanctions
item.description: If foreign nationals abroad, such as Francesca Albanese, could claim such immunity, much of the U.S. sanctions framework would be at risk.

item.title: Senate GOP Delays Vote on Filibuster-Proof Funding Bill Amid Backlash Over Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: Senate Republicans are postponing consideration of their filibuster-proof immigration enforcement funding bill until June after it encountered opposition.

item.title: A Gas-Tax Holiday Will Not Help Drivers, Only Prolong the Supply Crunch
item.description: Proposals for a gas tax holiday are more about political theater than improving conditions for drivers.

item.title: In Hearing on Court-Packing's Partisan Perils, No Democrat Disavowed It
item.description: Democrats are pushing for court-packing because they dislike the rulings of this good court, Jim Jordan said.
